scripts.dev:clean: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "$conn = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 5180 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if ($conn) { $procIds = $conn | Select-Object -ExpandProperty OwningProcess -Unique; foreach ($procId in $procIds) { Stop-Process -Id $procId -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue } }; npm run dev -- --port 5180 --strictPort"
